__EMPTY: 1. Verify that the website logo is visible, clear, and properly aligned on all pages.
2. Confirm that clicking the logo navigates to the homepage from every page.
3. Verify the top header/menu bar is displayed correctly on all pages.
4. Check that all primary menu items are visible and clickable.
5. Verify submenu items (if available) open correctly and are clickable.
6. Ensure header elements (phone number, email, social media icons) are visible if applicable.
7. Verify that phone, email, and social media links redirect to the correct destinations.
1. Check that breadcrumbs are displayed correctly on applicable pages and navigate properly.
2. Verify that each menu item navigates to the correct page.
3. Validate that internal page links (within-page anchors) work correctly.
4. Confirm that all hyperlinks inside paragraphs are clickable and redirect to the correct pages.
5. Ensure external links open in a new tab (if required).
1. Verify that headers (H1, H2, etc.) use consistent font styles and sizes across pages.
2. Check that paragraph text is properly aligned and readable on all pages.
3. Verify list items (bullets or numbered lists) are properly aligned and formatted.
4. Check for spelling and grammatical errors on every page.
5. Ensure content is not cut off, overlapping, or misaligned.
1. Verify that the contact form is displayed properly (if available).
2. Check that required fields show appropriate error messages when left empty.
3. Validate email and phone number fields with correct input rules.
4. Verify error messages are clear and user-friendly.
5. Check that a success message is displayed after successful form submission.
6. Confirm that form data is submitted and saved correctly.
1. Verify that button text font, size, and style are consistent across all pages.
2. Check that button labels/text are clear, readable, and not truncated.
3. Verify that all buttons are clickable and responsive to user interaction.
4. Confirm that each button redirects to the correct page, section, or action.
5. Verify hover effects (if applicable) are working correctly and are consistent across all pages.
6. Check that button background color, text color, and border style are consistent across the website.
7. Verify active and focus states (on click / keyboard navigation) are displayed properly.
8. Ensure disabled buttons (if any) are visually distinguishable and not clickable.
9. Verify buttons do not overlap with other UI elements on any screen size.
10. Check that buttons are aligned properly (center/left/right as per design).
11. Verify buttons work correctly on mobile, tablet, and desktop devices.
12. Ensure multiple clicks do not cause duplicate actions (e.g., multiple form submissions).
13. Verify loading indicators (spinner/disabled state) appear when an action takes time.
1. Verify social media icons are visible (header/footer as applicable).
2. Check that all social media links redirect to the correct profiles.
3. Verify footer links (Privacy Policy, Terms, About, etc.) are working correctly.
4. Verify the website is responsive on mobile, tablet, and desktop devices.
5. Check that menus, text, and buttons adjust properly on different screen sizes.
6. Test the website on different browsers (Chrome, Edge, Firefox, Safari).
1. Verify page load time is acceptable.
2. Check that images load correctly and are optimized.
3. Ensure no broken links or missing images.
4. Verify smooth scrolling and user-friendly navigation.
Verify the form is submitted successfully with valid data.
Verify CAPTCHA (if present) works correctly.
Confirm that multiple submissions are prevented (button disabled / loader shown).
Verify loading indicator is displayed during form submission.

Website Testing Checklist: J. Thank You Page / Post-Submission Behavior

__EMPTY: Verify whether the form redirects to a Thank You page after submission.
If redirected:
Verify the Thank You page loads correctly.
Check that the content/message on the Thank You page is correct, clear, and user-friendly.
Verify submitted details are not displayed incorrectly or exposed.
Verify if the Thank You page:
Redirects automatically to the homepage after a defined time, OR
Stays on the Thank You page as per requirement.
If auto-redirect exists, verify:
Redirect timing is correct.
Redirect navigates to the correct page (Homepage or specified page).
Verify manual navigation options (Home / Back button) work correctly from the Thank You page.
Confirm that page refresh does not resubmit the form.
Verify that an email notification is triggered after form submission (if applicable).
Confirm who receives the email: Admin email, User email, Both
Verify the sender email address (“From” email) is correct and matches configuration.
Check the email subject line is correct and meaningful.
Verify email body content:
Submitted form data is accurate.
Proper formatting (line breaks, labels).
No missing or extra fields.
Verify branding in email (logo, footer text, contact details) if applicable.
Check that auto-response email is sent to the user (if configured).
Verify auto-response email content is correct and user-friendly.
Confirm emails are not sent multiple times for a single submission.
Verify email delivery (not landing in spam, correct sender domain).
Check email works across major email clients (Gmail, Outlook, etc.).
Verify proper error message is shown if email sending fails.
Verify form data is not lost unexpectedly.
